summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AbdoulGame V6 massive integration. Fixed critical API URL bug in App.js. All 33 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend features verified: Stats Modal, Achievements Modal (10 achievements), Game Mode Selector (4 modes), XP bar, combo system, inspirational quotes, daily challenge. Core gameplay working correctly.

minor.issue: Word placement algorithm sometimes places fewer words than target (e.g., 4 instead of 5 for level 5) due to grid constraints

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - API calls were using ${API}/api/... resulting in /api/api/... paths

passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint (33/33 tests pass)
Backend: Security headers present
Backend: Knowledge DB returns 39 words across 12 categories
Backend: All 12 categories with ES/EN/FR translations
Backend: Game generation for levels 1, 5, 10
Backend: AI hints in all 3 languages
Backend: AI wisdom for all 12 categories
Backend: Share text generation
Backend: Score saving and retrieval
Backend: Input sanitization
Backend: NEW - Achievements endpoint returns 10 achievements in ES/EN/FR
Backend: NEW - Inspirational quotes for all 12 categories in 3 languages
Backend: NEW - Daily challenge with consistent board per day
Frontend: Start screen loads with all V6 elements
Frontend: Stats button visible and opens Stats Modal
Frontend: Achievements button visible and opens Achievements Modal
Frontend: Game Mode Selector shows 4 modes (Normal, Practice, Daily, Zen)
Frontend: XP bar visible on start screen (0/1000 XP)
Frontend: Category selector in Game Mode Selector
Frontend: Game board loads correctly
Frontend: Timer, score, word bank visible during gameplay
Frontend: Hint button disabled when score < 100
Frontend: Clear button works
Frontend: Guide modal shows updated sections (COMBOS mentioned)
Frontend: Settings modal with display mode toggle
Frontend: Exit confirmation modal works
Frontend: No critical console errors
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: API URL bug in App.js - calls were using ${API}/api/... instead of ${API}/... (lines 322, 326, 599, 749)
Word placement algorithm could be improved to guarantee placing all target words for each level
seed_data_creation: TEST_Player score saved during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: V6 integration complete and tested. Fixed API URL bug (was /api/api/...). All new features working: Stats Modal shows Level/XP/category breakdown, Achievements Modal shows 10 achievements with unlock progress, Game Mode Selector has 4 modes with category filter, XP bar on home screen, combo system in guide. Backend has 180 inspirational quotes, 10 achievements, daily challenge endpoint. Frontend utilities: achievements.js, particles.js, sounds.js, smartHints.js, visualFeedback.js, gameHelpers.js all integrated.

stats_modal.details: Shows Level, XP, total words, best score, best streak, games played, and category breakdown for all 12 categories

achievements_modal.details: Shows all 10 achievements with unlock status (0/10 initially). Achievements: Filósofo, Maestro del Tiempo, Políglota, Perfeccionista, Buscador de Sabiduría, Demonio de la Velocidad, Campeón, Maestro del Combo, Explorador del Corazón, Todoterreno

game_mode_selector.details: 4 modes available: Normal, Práctica (with category selector), Desafío Diario, Modo Zen

xp_bar.details: Visible on start screen showing Nivel 1 and 0/1000 XP progress

combo_system.details: Mentioned in guide. Combo counter hidden initially, appears after 3+ consecutive words

inspirational_quotes.details: Backend returns quotes for all 12 categories in 3 languages

daily_challenge.details: Backend generates consistent board per day. Frontend integration working

smart_hints.details: Contextual hints by category implemented in smartHints.js

visual_effects.details: Category particles, combo effects, level up effects, achievement toasts implemented

category_sounds.details: 12 unique sound profiles per category implemented in sounds.js

bugs_fixed_this_iteration.issue: API URL construction bug - calls were using ${API}/api/... instead of ${API}/...
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.impact: Achievements, categories, inspirational quotes, and daily challenge API calls were failing with 404
